title: Early Rising
content:
"God bless the man who first invented sleep!"
        So Sancho Panza said, and so say I:
    And bless him, also, that he didn't keep

title: Comic Miseries
content:
My dear young friend, whose shining wit
        Sets all the room a-blaze,
